statement: Unrestricted CarrierRegistryExhaustiveness is blocked unless zero-arity admissible predicates are either represented by a registered carrier or formally excluded from RealChronosAdmissiblePredicate.
weakest_sufficient_resolution: prove zero-arity admissible predicates are represented
or refine RealChronosAdmissiblePredicate so zero-arity predicates are outside the unrestricted Chronos domain
boundary: Obstruction-boundary statement only; no zero-arity resolution or theorem-level closure asserted.
